# `PrintNumber`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  X16  
**Parameters:** `b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Prints a hexadecimal number (byte) at the current screenmemory position (see moveto).
<p>Example:
<code>
var i:byte = 64;;
begin
  moveto(5,5,hi(screen_char_loc));
  printnumber(i); // will print 40 (in hex)
...
</code>


</div>
